3065120.name: Max's Adventure
3065120.description:
Max's Adventure: A Fun-Filled 2D Platformer!

(definitely not written by AI)

Welcome to Max's Adventure, an exciting 2D platformer that brings the joy and enthusiasm of a dog's life straight to your screen! Dive into a vibrant world where Max, your lovable canine hero, embarks on a delightful journey filled with fun and challenges. This game is a labor of love, crafted for the sheer enjoyment of playing about my dog Max.

Gameplay
In Max's Adventure, players guide Max through various levels, with Max trying to reach his goals!

Playable Characters
While Max is the star of the show, he's not alone on this adventure. Meet the other furry friends who join the fun:

Cheddar: Max's loyal companion, Cheddar, brings her own unique flair to the game. She can take a hit or two but is slower!

Brian: Another playful pup, Brian, joins the adventure with his special skills. He's more agile and can jump higher but in a sprint won't keep up!

Join Max, Cheddar, and Brian on this whimsical journey and experience the pure fun of a dog's adventure. Are you ready to embark on Max's Adventure? Let's play and discover the world through the eyes of our furry friends!
3065120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
